---
date: "2026-06-08T12:00:00+00:00"
draft: false
image: img/portfolio/bancr/logo.png
showonlyimage: false
title: code - bancr
weight: 6
bibliography: asb.bib
---

[![Zenodo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Zenodo-10.5281%2Fzenodo.20350647-1f4d2b)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20350647)

<!--more-->

<img src="/img/portfolio/bancr/logo.png" align="right" height="120" style="box-shadow:none;border:none;margin-left:1em" />

**bancr** is the primary R client for the BANC connectome. It wraps the CAVE, SeaTable, Google Cloud Storage and synapse-query endpoints behind a small set of R functions that return tidy tables, neuron objects and ggplot scenes.

**What you can use it for.** Use it to pull the per-neuron metadata table, query connectivity and pre-computed influence, find cross-dataset NBLAST matches, read neuron meshes and skeletons, transform neurons into shared template spaces, and render canonical views. It is the natverse entry point to the BANC.

**Source:** [natverse/bancr](https://github.com/natverse/bancr). **Archive:** Zenodo, [10.5281/zenodo.20350647](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20350647).

**Cite as:** Bates et al., 2026: bancr (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20350647).
